channel.title: AI Tools on Judy AI Lab
channel.description: Recent content in AI Tools on Judy AI Lab

item.title: Claude Code Skill Finally Testable! Five Major Updates to Official Skill Creator Explained
item.description: Skill Creator major update: Eval testing, Benchmark, A/B blind testing, multi-agent parallelization, trigger optimization—from ‘seems fine to me’ to ‘I’m confident it works.’
